notes.workspace_id: Prefer the workspace UUID from rooiam-app for the hosted widget runtime. Leave blank only if you intentionally want to fall back to the workspace slug.
notes.workspace_slug: Create a workspace in rooiam-app (5172) as Workspace Owner or Workspace Admin, then copy the workspace slug here.
notes.client_id: Create an app in that workspace and copy its client ID here.
notes.app_name: Use the app display name here so the widget/login surface stays contextual.
notes.widget_base_url: This is the hosted login/widget runtime URL served by Rooiam.
